title: Singapore MRT Alstom Movia R151
description: Singapore MRT Alstom Movia R151 for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The Alstom Movia R151 is the latest generation train operating on the Singapore MRT's North South and East West Lines, the network's earliest lines. Intended to replace all C151, C651, and C751B trains, 106 trainsets are set to be built. The train entered service on the East West Line in 2023 and the North South Line in 2024.

This pack adds this train to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod as a retexture of the default K-Train.

**Minecraft Transit Railway** is required for this pack.

Contents:
- SMRT Trains R151 (regular and mini variants)
